description: Plays a baked translate / rotate / scale animation track on the target. The track is expected to be embedded in the glTF (standard glTF animation, played via Three.js AnimationMixer / RealityKit AnimationResource) OR provided inline in params.tracks for procedural cases.

trackName.desc: Name of the embedded glTF animation track to play. If omitted, the first track on the target is used.

tracks.desc: Optional inline { translation: [[t, x,y,z], ...], rotation: ..., scale: ... } when there's no glTF track.

duration.desc: Defaults to the natural length of the embedded track.
